title: ilex strigillosa
intro: Ilex strigillosa, also known as the Texas holly or yaupon holly, is a shrub or small tree native to the southern United States, particularly in the eastern and southern regions. It has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ilex strigillosa include supporting immune function, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting potential antineoplastic properties. Ilex strigillosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional folk medicine.
